calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-12-2025 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-13-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 206 for short cause trial.
Dept. 613; Judge: Andrew Cheng; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: For the Record (11:10am-11:13am).
Eric Phillips, Esq., appearing on behalf of Plaintiff McMillan Data Communications, Inc. dba MDC Low Voltage Systems.
No appearance by Defendant Keentek, Inc.
Witness James Murray sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
Damages $111,330.00
Total $111,330.00

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Requests For Admission Be Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Apr-25-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF MCMILLAN DATA COMMUNICATIONS, INC. DBA MDC LOW VOLTAGE SYSTEMS' Motion For Order That Matters In Requests For Admission Be Deemed Admitted.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The motion is denied without prejudice. The Requests for Admission referenced in paragraph 3 of the Immordino Declaration were not attached as Exhibit A.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-08-2024 Set For Trial On May-12-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Oct-08-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2024 Set For Trial On Apr-07-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
